children.heading: Eligible land
children.label: 1 Eligible land
children.text: Notwithstanding sections 3839aa–21(4) and 3839aa–22(b)(2) of this title, the term “eligible land” means cropland on a farm for which base acres have been maintained by the Secretary under .section 9012(d)(3) of title 7

children.heading: Initiative
children.label: 2 Initiative
children.text: The term “initiative” means the grassland conservation initiative established under subsection (b).

children.heading: Establishment and purpose
children.label: b Establishment and purpose
children.text: The Secretary shall establish within the program a grassland conservation initiative for the purpose of assisting producers in protecting grazing uses, conserving and improving soil, water, and wildlife resources, and achieving related conservation values by conserving eligible land through grassland conservation contracts under subsection (e).

children.heading: Election
children.label: c Election
children.text: Beginning in fiscal year 2019, the Secretary shall provide a 1-time election to enroll eligible land in the initiative under a contract described in subsection (e).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Beginning in fiscal year 2019, of the funds made available for this subpart under , and notwithstanding any payment under title I of the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018, an amendment made by that title, or , the Secretary shall make annual grassland conservation contract payments to the producer of any eligible land that is the subject of a grassland conservation contract under this section.section 3841(a)(3)(B) of this titlesection 3839aa–24(c) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: eligible for payments under ; orsection 3839aa–24(d) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: subject to the payment limitations under this subpart.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 3 Limitation
children.text: The amount of an annual payment under this subsection shall be $18 per acre, not to exceed the number of base acres on a farm.

children.heading: Considered planted
children.label: h Considered planted
children.text: The Secretary shall consider land enrolled under a grassland conservation contract under this section during a crop year to be planted or considered planted to a covered commodity (as defined in ) during that crop year.section 9011 of title 7
